{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20992_1
|class_id=20992
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20992_2
|fame=31
|art=17
|fth=17
|civ=12
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>prop@58576_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>prop@58576_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58576_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58576_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58576_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500<br> (Awakened)
}}
